perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a busy title screen showing a shopping cart filled with grocery bags and produce at a Costco store, with a text overlay announcing a weekly price report for June 16th to June 22nd. (2) A rapid series of static shots follows, each showcasing different consumer goods stacked on warehouse shelves or in cold storage units. (3) Products range from beverages and meats to household supplies, snacks, and frozen foods, each appearing for about 1-2 seconds. (4) The video maintains this montage style throughout, ending on a final shot of a sparkling wine package.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A fast-paced, upbeat electronic background track begins immediately and maintains a consistent tempo throughout the video. (2) A male voiceover enters, speaking in an energetic and promotional tone, announcing the Costco weekly report. (3) For each visual cut, the male speaker quickly announces the brand name and the specific discounted price of the product shown. (4) No ambient store noises or sound effects are present; the audio consists entirely of the music bed and the clean studio-recorded voiceover.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: The intro displays '好市多 每週特價速報 06/16~06/22' (Costco Weekly Special Report) and '記得追蹤我們' (Remember to follow us). (2) Functional/Decorative Text: Every product shot features a large central text overlay with the Brand (e.g., 'COCA COLA', 'KIRKLAND'), the product description, and pricing details: '原價' (Original Price), '-66' (Discount amount), and '特價' (Special Price) highlighted in red or yellow. (3) The text is designed to be highly legible and informative, conveying a sense of value and urgency.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire product and price list montage

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: No humans are visible; the focus is entirely on products.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Various warehouse storage shelves, refrigerated sections, and product display areas typical of a Costco wholesale store.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Sequence of Items -> Close
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional price bulletin designed to inform Costco members in Taiwan about specific weekly discounts across a wide variety of grocery and household products. By using fast-paced editing and energetic voiceovers, it creates a sense of variety and value, aiming to drive store traffic during the June 16-22 period.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products with prices and explicit promotional callouts.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-cut price reporting format with consistent brand-first text graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: This content is highly optimized for short-form social media platforms, focusing on raw information density (price and brand) rather than narrative storytelling.
